pr.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1632

output.summary: AutoResearch agent stacks high-impact PR fixes—wider MLP, seq4096, tuned optimizer, int6 QAT, per-row quant, sliding-window eval—to fit 16MB artifacts.
techniques: AutoResearch agent pipelines open PRs to compose high-impact edits
STE-based int6 QAT plus per-row int6 quant with fp16 tied embeddings
3× MLP, seq4096 training, and sliding-window eval with tuned LR/momentum
